domains.user_problem: Understand identity, traits, motivation, interests, values, or learning pattern.
domains.claim_boundary_notes: Descriptive and interpretive claims are allowed when scale claim boundaries pass.
domains.evidence_requirement: Visible evidence or report explanation is required before public claims.
domains.seo_geo_policy: Does not grant SEO/GEO eligibility automatically.

domains.user_problem: Clarify career direction and decision support without implying recommendation runtime.
domains.claim_boundary_notes: Career decision support is not career success prediction or precise recommendation.
domains.evidence_requirement: Visible evidence, claim boundary, and source authority are required before public decision claims.
domains.recommendation_policy: Domain mapping does not grant recommendation eligibility.
domains.seo_geo_policy: Career SEO/GEO eligibility requires evidence and discoverability gates.

domains.user_problem: Understand work style, collaboration mode, and workplace preference.
domains.claim_boundary_notes: Workstyle claims must not become hiring suitability or employment-worth claims.
domains.evidence_requirement: Visible report or answer evidence required before workplace public claims.
domains.recommendation_policy: Explanation or next-step only unless separate recommendation guard passes.
domains.seo_geo_policy: SEO/GEO requires claim and evidence guards.
domains.profile_policy: Longitudinal only for approved normal/sensitive signals.

domains.claim_boundary_notes: Relationship claims must remain interpretive and non-diagnostic.
domains.evidence_requirement: Relationship evidence or report explanation required.
domains.recommendation_policy: Explanation only unless separate guard passes.
domains.profile_policy: Relationship-sensitive policy applies when signal sensitivity requires it.

domains.claim_boundary_notes: Learning claims must not claim fixed ability destiny.
domains.seo_geo_policy: SEO only until visible evidence and source authority pass.
domains.profile_policy: Summary or longitudinal only when sensitivity permits.

domains.user_problem: Understand temporary emotional or mental-state signals.
domains.claim_boundary_notes: Sensitive by default; must not be diagnostic.
domains.seo_geo_policy: private_noindex by default for mental-health-sensitive signals.

domains.user_problem: Understand ability-estimate or skill-growth signals without evaluating human worth.
domains.claim_boundary_notes: Ability-sensitive by default; must not evaluate human worth or employment suitability.
domains.seo_geo_policy: seo_only at most unless separate guard passes.

domains.claim_boundary_notes: Team claims must not become employee scoring.

domains.seo_geo_policy: SEO/GEO requires evidence and claim review.
domains.profile_policy: summary or longitudinal only when sensitivity permits.

domains.user_problem: Support value, purpose, and long-range direction reflection.
domains.claim_boundary_notes: Life-direction claims must remain reflective and non-deterministic.
domains.seo_geo_policy: SEO/GEO requires claim and evidence guards.

hardRules: career_decision does not imply recommendation eligibility.
domain mapping does not grant SEO/GEO eligibility automatically.
domain mapping does not grant freemium eligibility automatically.
domain mapping does not grant profile contribution automatically.
